data.title: MATIC tests $0.58 resistance for February recovery. Currently at $0.38, RSI at 38.00. Potential to reach $0.45-$0.52 if key resistance levels are broken soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently priced at $0.38 and has a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 38.00. Technical analysis indicates a possible uptrend to a range of $0.45 to $0.52 if Polygon manages to surpass important resistance levels in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: Monday.com improves AI agent testing speed by 8.7x with LangSmith integration - testing time reduced from 162 to 18 seconds.
data.description: A programming framework known as LangSmith, implemented by Monday Service, has significantly reduced the testing time for AI agents from 162 seconds to just 18 seconds. This improvement was achieved through an evaluation-driven development approach combined with parallel processing techniques.

data.title: DOGE price expected to reach $0.11 short-term, eyeing $0.16 by March 2026, currently at $0.10 with neutral momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogecoin is currently trading at $0.10 with stable momentum. Analysis of its technical indicators indicates a short-term price target of $0.11, with further potential to reach $0.16 by March 2026.
Diplomatic Talks in Geneva Resume Over Ukraine – RIA

data.title: Pharmacelera secures €6M for U.S. expansion and platform advancement, led by Heran Partners, Clave Capital, Inveready, and Bio&Tech Smart Capital.
data.description: Pharmacelera secures a major investment round led by Heran Partners, along with participation from Clave Capital, Inveready, and Bio&Tech Smart Capital Financing. This funding will empower Pharmacelera to strengthen connections with key pharmaceutical and biotechnology clients in the United States. The company's platform, which explores a vast chemical 'exaSpace', will now be able to more precisely identify novel solutions.

data.title: SOL price eyes $95 by March despite trading at $85.72 now. Technicals hint at possible recovery in 4-6 weeks if resistance at 95 breaks.
data.description: The price of Solana is currently at $85.72, experiencing a downward trend in the market. Despite this, technical analysis indicates a possible upturn towards $95 if a crucial resistance level is breached. Analysts predict that this recovery could occur within the next 4-6 weeks. This suggests a short-term target for potential investors to keep an eye on.

data.title: Lift acquires 50% interest in Galinée Property from Azimut in Quebec, adjacent to Adina lithium deposit.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 18, 2026, Li-FT Power Ltd. (TSXV: LIFT) (OTCQX: LIFFF) (Frankfurt: WS0) has successfully completed the acquisition of a 50% stake in the Galinée property from Azimut Exploration Inc. (TSXV: AZM) (OTCQX: AZMTF) in Québec. This property is adjacent to the Adina lithium deposit, owned by Winsome Resources Ltd. The remaining 50% interest in the Galinée Property is currently held by SOQUEM Inc. This acquisition follows press releases from December 15 and December 24, 2025.

data.title: Elbit Systems lands $277M contracts for 30mm turrets and munitions, boosting international supply.
data.description: In Haifa, Israel, on February 18, 2026, Elbit Systems Ltd. disclosed that it had secured contracts worth around $277 million from an international client for the procurement of 30 mm turrets. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ESLT and on TASE as ESLT, revealed this information.

data.title: Cardano aims for $0.31 recovery as technical signals hint at breakout; resistance at $0.29, potential range $0.31-$0.35.
data.description: The ADA price forecast indicates that Cardano is currently facing a crucial resistance level at $0.29, with a possible increase to the range of $0.31 to $0.35 if there is a confirmed technical breakout above the resistance of the Bollinger Band.

data.title: E3 Lithium to showcase at PDAC 2026 Convention in Toronto from March 1-4 at Booth 2303, a key event for mineral industry.
data.description: E3 Lithium Ltd. (TSXV: ETL) (FSE: OW3) (OTCQX: EEMMF), a Canadian lithium development leader, will participate in the Prospectors and Developers Association of Canada (“PDAC”) 2026 convention. The event will take place at the Metro Toronto Convention Centre from March 1 to 4, 2026, where E3 Lithium will be at Booth 2303. PDAC is a globally recognized mineral conference attracting industry experts, investors, governments, and service providers.

data.title: Azimut Exploration sells 50% interest in Galinée Property to LiFT Power in Quebec's James Bay region, Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Azimut Exploration Inc. finalized the sale of its 50% stake in the Galinée Property situated in the Eeyou Istchee James Bay area of Quebec to LiFT Power Ltd. The acquiring company, LiFT, trades on the TSXV under the ticker LIFT and on the OTCQX as LIFFF. Azimut is represented by the tickers TSXV: AZM and OTCQX: AZMTF. This acquisition marks a significant development in the mining sector of the region.

data.title: comforte AG and ITSS Global collaborate to secure Temenos Transact Banks, protecting PII and payment data.
data.description: A partnership has been announced between comforte AG, a prominent data-centric security company, and ITSS Global, a leading Temenos delivery partner. This collaboration aims to assist retail, commercial, and private banks utilizing Temenos Transact in mitigating the dangers linked with unencrypted personally identifiable information (PII) and payment data within core banking systems and associated networks. This collaboration comes at a time when banks are increasingly adopting digital transformation and data-focused initiatives like fraud prevention.

Projections for Ripple anticipate a possible rebound to a range between $1.60 and $1.80 if bullish momentum manages to breach the current consolidation area.

data.title: ETH price aims $2,200 recovery after hitting $2,019; $1,912 critical support level for bullish trend.
data.description: The current price of Ethereum is $2,019, showing neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicators. Technical analysis indicates a short-term target of $2,200 if resistance is surpassed; however, it highlights the importance of the $1,912 support level for bullish momentum.

data.title: New Earth Resources uses high-res airborne geophysical techniques for rare earth element exploration in Red Wine project.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 18, 2026, New Earth Resources Corp. (CSE: EATH) revealed that integrated high-resolution airborne geophysical data shows priority zones for targeted rare earth element exploration at the Red Wine Rare Earth Elements (REE) project in Northwest Newfoundland and Labrador in central Labrador region. This geophysical data includes Magnetic+Radiometric information. The project is expected to enhance exploration efforts for rare earth elements.

data.title: BTC could hit $72K by March 2026 in a consolidation phase, pending break above key resistance at $69,600.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently in a neutral consolidation phase based on its technical indicators, with a potential to reach $72,000 by March if it can surpass key resistance levels currently set at $69,600. This prediction is based on the analysis of BTC price trend.
